comment: feat: add Menu component family — Menu, MenuTrigger, MenuPopover, MenuList, MenuItem, MenuItemCheckbox, MenuItemRadio, MenuItemSwitch, MenuItemLink, MenuDivider, MenuGroup, MenuGroupHeader, MenuSplitGroup. Wraps v9 useMenu*Base_unstable hooks and uses native popover='auto' for top-layer rendering instead of Portal. Uses focusgroup='menu block wrap' attribute for native arrow key navigation (W3C proposal).
